classifications.subject: OpenAI Codex lead on the new shape of product work | Andrew Ambrosino
classifications.rationale: Interview with Andrew Ambrosino (OpenAI Codex lead) on how AI coding agents are reshaping product development workflows. Directly relevant to coding-agents, AI-assisted development, and the evolving role of product teams. Codex is a key entity in the wiki.

classifications.subject: OpenAI Brings the Heat, Claude's Tag Team, and China Returns Fire
classifications.rationale: Industry roundup covering OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, and Chinese AI competition dynamics. High-level competitive landscape analysis relevant to multiple wiki entities and AI industry concept pages.

classifications.subject: Latest open artifacts (#22): Zyphra, Cohere, and Poolside are expanding the breadth of the ecosystem
classifications.rationale: Weekly open-source AI digest covering Zyphra, Cohere, and Poolside — expanding open-weight model ecosystem. Directly relevant to open-source AI entities and the open artifacts concept. Nathan Lambert is a known AI safety/open-source contributor.

classifications.subject: Exclusive Interview with Akshay Kothari, Co-Founder & COO of Notion
classifications.rationale: Interview with Notion co-founder. Notion is increasingly an AI-integrated productivity platform, but this is primarily a business/product interview. Marginal relevance for wiki unless it covers AI features in depth.
